meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Bluerails Discovery
products.tagline: The rails AI agents use to find and pay you
products.summaryZh: AI代理用于寻找并支付给你的轨道
products.descriptionZh:
大多数"AI可见性"工具仅止步于告知你AI是否提及你的品牌。Bluerails更进一步。我们让你对AI代理可见，并准备好通过它们获得收益——就在我们已为市场运营的轨道上。突出特点：  
• 发现：基于400个样本的同行评审AI可见性评分，而非一次性猜测。免费，无需注册。  
• 代理就绪结账+全球结算  
• 内置合规性  
立即免费获取你的发现报告；代理支付功能即将推出。
products.description: Most "AI visibility" tools stop at telling you if AI mentions your brand. Bluerails goes further. We make you discoverable to AI agents and ready to get paid by them, on the rails we already run for marketplaces. What stands out: • Discovery: a peer-reviewed AI-visibility score from 400 samples, not a one-off guess. Free, no signup. • Agent-ready checkout + global settlement • Compliance built in Try your free Discovery report today; agent payments roll out next.

products.name: OpenArt Director
products.tagline: Direct cinematic videos through chat
products.summaryZh: 通过聊天直接生成电影级视频
products.descriptionZh: OpenArt Director 让你只需通过对话即可创作电影级 AI 视频。可生成长达 5 分钟的视频，并保持角色、场景、语音、音乐和视觉风格的一致性。Director 能构建故事弧线、规划场景、维持连续性，并通过自然对话协助优化视频——其角色更像创意导演，而非传统视频生成工具。你不再只是生成片段，而是在导演故事。
products.description: OpenArt Director lets you create cinematic AI videos simply by chatting. Generate videos up to 5 minutes long with consistent characters, scenes, voice, music, and visual style throughout. Director develops story arcs, plans scenes, maintains continuity, and helps refine videos through natural conversation - acting more like a creative director than a traditional video generator. You're not generating clips anymore - you're directing stories.

products.name: Cotypist
products.tagline: Local AI Autocomplete in your voice, anywhere on your Mac
products.summaryZh: Mac 上任意位置均可使用的本地 AI 自动补全，支持你的语音
products.descriptionZh: Cotypist 是一款智能自动补全工具，适用于你已在使用的 Mac 应用：邮件、Slack、备忘录、文档，甚至 AI 提示词。当建议匹配时按 Tab 键，或继续输入并实时查看更新。在 Mac 本地运行，无需云端，无需 API 调用。
products.description: Cotypist is smart autocomplete for the Mac apps you already write in: Mail, Slack, Notes, docs, even AI prompts. Press Tab when a suggestion fits, or keep typing and watch it update in real time. Runs locally on your Mac. No cloud, no API calls.

products.name: Latitude
products.tagline: Fix what's breaking in your AI agent
products.summaryZh: 修复AI代理中的故障
products.descriptionZh: 开源AI代理监控平台。Latitude自动检测代理在大规模运行中失败的所有方式，并为你的编码代理提供修复工具。
products.description: Open-source AI agent monitoring platform. Latitude automatically detects all the ways your agents fail at scale, and gives your coding agent the tools to fix it.

products.name: Thumbmagic
products.tagline: AI thumbnail generator trained on top-performing thumbnails
products.summaryZh: AI缩略图生成器，基于高表现缩略图训练
products.descriptionZh: 大多数缩略图工具只提供通用模板，而Thumbmagic提供数据。在生成任何像素之前，Thumbmagic会分析200多个表现最佳的缩略图，研究科技评测者、财经创作者等群体中驱动点击的因素。结果如何？生成的缩略图不仅美观，更经过精心设计以实现高点击表现。
products.description: Most thumbnail tools give you generic templates. Thumbmagic gives you data. Before generating a single pixel, Thumbmagic analyzes 200+ top-performing thumbnails, studying what drives clicks for tech reviewers, finance creators, and more. The result? Thumbnails that don't just look good, they're engineered to perform.

products.name: Hush
products.tagline: Open-source noise suppression for voice AI agents
products.summaryZh: 开源噪声抑制，适用于语音AI代理
products.descriptionZh: Hush 可消除实时通话中的竞争语音、背景噪音和音频干扰，确保您的语音 AI 代理始终能听到关键信息。
products.description: Hush removes competing voices, background noise, and audio interference from real-time calls so your voice AI agents always hear what matters.

products.name: Jotform AI App Builder
products.tagline: Turn ideas into powerful apps within seconds
products.summaryZh: 将创意在数秒内转化为强大的应用
products.descriptionZh: 只需描述需求即可构建完整应用。Jotform AI App Builder 可自动生成页面、表单、工作流和数据管理功能，随后允许您通过AI或手动编辑进行优化。如需更高级功能，AI可自动生成仪表盘、图表、计算器和交互工具的自定义组件，或通过AI组件创建器自行设计。您可在单个应用中整合表单、表格、AI代理和自定义组件。
products.description: Build complete apps by describing what you need. Jotform AI App Builder generates pages, forms, workflows, and data management automatically, then lets you refine everything with AI or manual edits. If you need something more advanced, AI can automatically generate custom widgets for dashboards, charts, calculators, and interactive tools, or let you create your own with AI Widget Creator. Combine forms, tables, AI agents, and custom widgets in a single app.

products.name: Sakana Fugu
products.tagline: One Model to Command Them All
products.summaryZh: 一个模型，统御一切
products.descriptionZh: 前沿级性能，无需依赖单一供应商。Fugu 动态编排全球顶尖模型，处理复杂多步骤任务。通过单一 API，即刻将集体智能接入你的工作流程。
products.description: Frontier-level performance without single-vendor dependency. Fugu dynamically orchestrates the world's best models to tackle complex, multi-step tasks. Plug collective intelligence directly into your workflows today with a single API.

products.name: Blazly SEO
products.tagline: Dominate SEO with an AI content operating system
products.summaryZh: 用AI内容操作系统主导SEO
products.descriptionZh: Blazly SEO 是一款AI内容操作系统，帮助营销人员在一个平台上规划、撰写、优化、人性化处理及发布内容。可发现关键词、构建SEO策略、批量生成博客、自动化工作流程、连接Google Search Console、提升页面速度，并直接发布至WordPress、Webflow等平台。
products.description: Blazly SEO is the AI Content Operating System that helps marketers plan, write, optimize, humanize, and publish content from one platform. Discover keywords, build SEO strategies, generate blogs in bulk, automate workflows, connect Google Search Console, improve page speed, and publish directly to WordPress, Webflow, and more.

products.name: jebi
products.tagline: A supercharged terminal for Mac with built-in local AI
products.summaryZh: 为Mac打造的强力终端，内置本地AI
products.descriptionZh: jebi 是一款内置本地 AI 的增强型 Mac 终端——无需 API 密钥、无需订阅、无需云端。每次执行命令后，它会建议下一步操作。遇到错误？jebi 会用通俗易懂的英文解释并告诉你如何修复。输入 /ask 即可在终端内与 AI 对话。所有 AI 功能均通过 Qwen、Phi-3 和 Gemma 在设备本地运行——你的命令永远不会离开 Mac。美观的界面、分屏面板、标签页、自定义主题、颗粒纹理，以及 /ls 和 /ports 等斜杠命令。
products.description: jebi is a supercharged Mac terminal with built-in local AI — no API key, no subscription, no cloud. After every command, it suggests what to run next. Hit an error? jebi explains it in plain English and tells you how to fix it. Type /ask to chat with AI right in your terminal. All AI runs on-device with Qwen, Phi-3, and Gemma — your commands never leave your Mac. Beautiful UI, split panes, tabs, custom themes, grain texture, and slash commands like /ls and /ports.

products.name: Sipcode
products.tagline: Keep Claude Code's context clean for sharper answers
products.summaryZh: 保持Claude Code的上下文清晰，以获得更精准的回答。
products.descriptionZh: Claude Code 的上下文卫生。截断冗长的工具输出，并去重同一会话中的重复读取，使模型看到信号而非噪声。Anthropic 测量显示，更干净的上下文带来了 29% 的质量提升。证据：在锁定 20 个任务的基准测试中，工具输出中位数节省 62.6%。MIT 许可。
products.description: Context hygiene for Claude Code. Caps verbose tool output and dedupes same-session re-reads so the model sees signal, not noise. Anthropic measures 29% quality lift from cleaner context. Proof: 62.6% median tool-output savings on a locked 20-task benchmark. MIT.

products.name: Conduit
products.tagline: Fix the tool-list bloat slowing your AI agent
products.summaryZh: 修复拖慢AI代理的工具列表膨胀问题
products.descriptionZh: 你的智能体随着MCP服务器增加而变慢，问题不在模型。每个服务器每次请求都会将整个工具列表塞入上下文：3个服务器在你打招呼前就消耗约2.4万token。Conduit将它们置于一个本地网关之后，暴露3个元工具供智能体按需搜索。实测：每次请求工具开销减少97%，token减少约90%，任务成功率不变。云端或本地，一个工具或五个。密钥保存在系统钥匙串中。免费且开源。
products.description: Your agent got slower the more MCP servers you added, and it's not the model. Every server dumps its whole tool list into context on every request: 3 servers cost ~24k tokens before you even say hi. Conduit puts them behind one local gateway that exposes 3 meta-tools the agent searches on demand. Measured: 97% less tool overhead per request, ~90% fewer tokens, same task success. Cloud or local, one tool or five. Keys in your OS keychain. Free and open source.

products.name: BestDefense.io
products.tagline: Pentest and patch every deploy with AI
products.summaryZh: 使用AI对每次部署进行渗透测试和补丁修复
products.descriptionZh: AI攻击不会等待你的下一个迭代周期。BestDefense持续对每次部署进行渗透测试，验证哪些漏洞实际可被利用，并生成修复方案，让高合规性SaaS团队能在补救窗口关闭前修补真实风险。与静态扫描器不同，BestDefense通过执行验证漏洞利用，减少误报，帮助开发者更快地从发现问题转向修复问题。
products.description: AI attacks don’t wait for your next sprint. BestDefense continuously pentests every deploy, proves which vulnerabilities are actually exploitable, and generates fixes so high-compliance SaaS teams can patch real risks before remediation windows close. Unlike static scanners, BestDefense validates exploits through execution, cuts false positives, and helps developers move from finding issues to fixing them faster.

products.name: prepros
products.tagline: Run your brand shoots from start to finish
products.summaryZh: 从头到尾掌控品牌拍摄
products.descriptionZh: 品牌拍摄制作从未有过统一的工具或标准流程。每个团队都从零搭建自己的版本，拼凑文档、消息记录和文件夹，只为搭建基础框架。prepros 是一个专注的工作空间，整合情绪板、拍摄清单、通告单、团队管理、预算和拍摄日追踪。由一位从事拍摄工作十年、一直希望有这样的工具的人打造。无论你是第五十次还是第一次执行拍摄，规划过程应当与作品本身一样周全。
products.description: Brand shoot production has never had a single tool or standard process. Every team builds their own version from scratch, cobbling together docs, threads, and folders just to set up the scaffolding. prepros is one focused workspace for moodboards, shotlists, callsheets, crew, budgets, and shoot day tracking. Built by someone who spent a decade running shoots wishing it existed. Whether you're running your fiftieth shoot or your first, the planning should feel as considered as the work itself.

products.name: NeuralAgent 3.0
products.tagline: AI that executes UI actions on your computer in ~285ms
products.summaryZh: 能在约285毫秒内执行电脑UI操作的AI
products.descriptionZh: 3.0 新功能：闪电般快速的计算机操作模型。NeuralAgent 能查看你的屏幕并控制你的计算机完成实际工作，现在由我们的快速模型驱动，可在约 285 毫秒内执行 UI 操作，同时支持快速模型回放（保存任务，数秒内重新运行）和智能模型路由。它能规划、高速执行，并自我监督以进行恢复。支持桌面端和浏览器。兼容 Windows 和 macOS。自我们录制发布视频以来，快速模型已变得更快，请查看下方评论。
products.description: New in 3.0: our Lightning-Fast computer-use model. NeuralAgent sees your screen and controls your computer to get real work done, now powered by our Fast model that executes UI actions in ~285ms, alongside Fast Model Replays (save a task, re-run it in seconds) and Smart Model Routing. It plans, executes at high speed, and supervises itself for recovery. Desktop + browser. Windows + macOS. The fast model got even faster since we recorded the launch video, check out the comment below.

products.name: Buddy AI Note
products.tagline: Your daily memo that turns notes into a plan
products.summaryZh: 你的日常备忘录，将笔记转化为计划
products.descriptionZh: Buddy AI Note 是一款以备忘录为先的日常办公空间。你可以通过书写或语音记录一天的内容；Buddy 会将其整理，并将重要事项转化为可自动执行的小型计划。安全步骤（如提醒、专注时段、研究简报等）一键运行；任何需要发送给他人的内容都会暂停等待你审核。先计划再确认，而非自动执行。免费版包含：日历、每日备忘录以及 Google/Outlook 同步功能。AI 智能体（Buddy 聊天、任务规划与执行、语音备忘录）为付费升级功能。支持 iOS、Android 及网页端。
products.description: Buddy AI Note is a memo-first daily workspace. Write or speak your day; Buddy organizes it and turns what matters into a small plan it can run for you. Safe steps (reminders, focus time, a research brief...) run on one click; anything sent to others pauses for your review. Plan-then-confirm, not autopilot. Free to start: calendar, daily memo, and Google/Outlook sync. The AI agent (Buddy chat, task plan & execute, voice memos) is the paid upgrade. iOS, Android & web.

products.name: Deckwise
products.tagline: AI presentation agent for editable decks
products.summaryZh: AI演示助手，支持可编辑幻灯片
products.descriptionZh: Deckwise是一款AI演示助手，能将主题、笔记、文件及素材转化为清晰、可编辑的演示文稿。它先规划大纲，再生成结构化的幻灯片，并允许你通过AI助手持续优化：用套索工具选中任意部分，即可要求Deckwise重写、重新设计、调整顺序或润色。并非一次性生成——而是与你共同改进。
products.description: Deckwise is the AI presentation agent that turns topics, notes, files, and sources into clear, editable decks.Deckwise is an AI presentation agent that turns topics, notes, files, and sources into clear, editable decks. It plans the outline first, creates structured slides, and lets you keep improving them with an agent: select any part with lasso, then ask Deckwise to rewrite, redesign, reorder, or polish it. Not just generated once — improved with you.

products.name: Amnesia
products.tagline: A Mac app that asks why you opened that tab
products.summaryZh: 一款Mac应用，会询问你为何打开那个标签页。
products.descriptionZh: Amnesia 是一款本地优先的 macOS 菜单栏应用，专为那些打开 X、YouTube、Reddit、Slack 或分析面板后忘记初衷的人设计。它会询问你的意图，在屏幕上显示一个小计时器，检查你是否完成了原本要做的事，并将一天的使用情况整理成一份私人报告，记录打开次数、遗忘的意图以及浪费的时间。
products.description: Amnesia is a local-first macOS menu bar app for people who open X, YouTube, Reddit, Slack, or analytics dashboards and forget why. It asks for your intent, keeps a tiny timer on-screen, checks whether you did what you came to do, and turns the day into a private report of opens, forgotten intents, and time lost.

products.name: Steam Machine
products.tagline: A tiny, powerful PC for big-screen gaming
products.summaryZh: 为畅享大屏游戏而生的迷你强效PC
products.descriptionZh: Steam Machine 是一款小巧而强大的大屏游戏PC。这款约6英寸的立方体设备，性能是Steam Deck的六倍以上，能以4K 60帧运行整个Steam游戏库——包括3A大作。登录后，你的游戏即刻呈现。它搭载SteamOS，即插即用，保持低温且静音运行，并能与Steam Controller即时配对。同时它也是一台完整的PC：可安装自有应用甚至其他操作系统。强大PC游戏体验，轻松置于电视之下。
products.description: Steam Machine is a tiny, powerful PC for big-screen gaming. A roughly 6-inch cube with over six times the power of Steam Deck, it plays your entire Steam library—AAA titles included—at 4K 60 FPS. Sign in and your games are right there. It runs SteamOS for a plug-and-play experience, stays cool and whisper-quiet, and pairs instantly with the Steam Controller. It's still a full PC too: install your own apps or even another OS. Powerful PC gaming made easy, right under your TV.

products.name: wildbirds
products.tagline: Birdwatchers app to share and discover birds socially
products.summaryZh: Birdwatchers 应用：以社交方式分享和发现鸟类
products.descriptionZh: Wildbirds 是一款为始终仰望天空的人打造的App。在这里，每一次新鸟种记录都值得庆祝。由爱鸟人士为爱鸟人士设计。这是一个友善、包容的观鸟平台，让每个人都能分享鸟类照片并记录自己的观鸟清单。我们新增的“发现”功能，将通过文章、播客、纪录片及其他精选观鸟资源，帮助你发现值得关注的新朋友。适用于iPhone、iPad、Android、Web及Mac平台。
products.description: Wildbirds is an app for the ones who always look up. A place where lifers get celebrated. For bird lovers by bird lovers. A kind, inclusive birding platform for everyone to share their bird photos and keep track of their life list. Our new Discovery feature to will help you discover new people to follow through articles, podcasts, documentaries and other curated birding resources. Available on iPhone, iPad, Android, Web, and Mac.
